title: Streaming Events, Accessible Status, Cancellation, Reconnect, and Rendering · Runtime Lens: Agent Event Model
summary: Token deltas overwrite tool status, every chunk is announced, focus jumps, cancel is mouse-only, reconnect duplicates output, and color is the only failure signal. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent event model increment in accessible typed agent event stream. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-cas…
objectives: Define typed lifecycle, model delta, tool request, approval, tool progress, result, warning, error, terminal, and usage events with stable identity.
Design and test compensation where possible, preserve partial evidence, stop visibly when safety is uncertain, and escalate irreversible outcomes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-streaming-events-accessibility-2
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-streaming-events-accessibility-2.
# Case 7417: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def worked_agentpy_streaming_events_accessibility_2(events: int = 80, assembled_events: int = 80, announced_milestones: int = 8, cancellable_states: int = 5, duplicate_events: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorityworked2",
        "interaction7417",
        "tool2dekrow",
        "stateworked27417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if events < 1 or assembled_events < 0:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-event-count"
    if assembled_events != events:
        return False, assembled_events, "stream-assembly"
    if announced_milestones < 4 or cancellable_states < 2:
        return False, announced_milestones, "accessible-stream-control"
    if duplicate_events > 0:
        return False, duplicate_events, "stream-duplication"
    assert assembled_events == events and duplicate_events == 0
    return True, assembled_events, "accessible-agent-event-stream"
